economic_notes: OCN owns and operates businesses in cannabis, food and beverage, casino, transportation, construction, farming, and energy industries through 14 business entities accounted for by modified equity method. Loans receivable from Meta Growth Corp totalling $13,000,000 at 10% interest. Prior year restatement to include Opaskwayak Cree Child and Family Services and OCN Gaming Commission in consolidation.
notes: Prior year figures restated to include Opaskwayak Cree Child and Family Services and OCN Gaming Commission in consolidation, significantly affecting comparatives. 14 business entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs). 9 entities fully consolidated. Financial statements include year-ended December 31, 2022 data for most incorporated entities and March 31, 2023 for unincorporated entities and Aseneskak Casino. Large deferred revenue balance of $47.4M. Gains on investments of $2.23M noted in revenue. Construction in progress of $17.77M primarily for Amisk West Subdivision. Expenses by object note was cut off in source document. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all identified government transfers (ISC, FNIH, ESDC, CMHC, NRC, Public Safety Canada, Province of Manitoba, AMC, MKO).
